scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:admin
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:admin
scripts.verify:backend: npm run test:api && npm run typecheck:api && npm run build:api
scripts.verify:admin: npm run typecheck:admin && npm run build:admin
scripts.verify: npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:admin
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run typecheck
